item.title: Hundrets of Thousands are demonstrating.
item.description: Hello USA, this is what a demonstration against a dictator looks like, not just Luigi memes. Hundreds of thousands gathered on the streets of Istanbul this Saturday during protests in Turkey. The CHP is even talking about 2.2 million demonstrators. They are demanding İmamoğlu's release and the resignation of the Erdoğan government.
item.dc:creator: truemdgeist1337

item.title: Depressing Saturday dump
item.description:
17734/36500 https://gofund.me/8b5802c4 Proud AF of his wife lol
She seems fun
When does a family become a clan?
She's a keeper
It took me a couple watches to catch it, honestly
I want to love on an elephant
Damn monkeys
He regretted once they found him lol
I miss my best friend. RIP Jaybird. Love you brother.
A great mother.
Hehehe
Adorable
They were synchronized
Dawwwwww
MOOD
item.dc:creator: Dorlingus

item.title: Not a great or big dump, but it’s the something that something
item.dc:creator: RubyMoonNite

item.title: PROTEST UPDATE: Cliff Cash posted a video. "YES PROTESTING WORKS!"
item.description:
Cliff Cash has a simple request: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EJ3NBaTx1W8 Please, don't give up hope. Keep the pressure up and join him if at all possible. If NOT possible, but you can go somewhere else, then do it. If you can't protest at all, then please share his video and give it a like and subscribe to him too to get that bloody algorithm to wake up. We each have a part to play in this, big or small.
The rage is building. People harness it for positive change, but people need to ACT and NOW. THESE are (some of) the people responsible - the Council for National Policy: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NgQoOCdV6aU FUCK them. (Not the two people in the video though, they're cool.)
item.dc:creator: Mirrormancer

item.title: Leopards eating faces - March Update
item.description:
1. Maga in those states should be happy.
2. Failed the election vote performance.
3. Should have read the Project 2025 manifesto.
4. The prices are going to go up. Way up. He should be happy.
5. Sounds like racism? Kamala was an accomplished prosecutor and vp.
6. Sigh. Should have read project 2025.
7. Dangit. Bad enough dealing with flu and covid. I don't want more illnesses.
8. Moscow Mitch approves.
9. Should have read...nevermind.
10. 3 times stupid. Wow.
11. They got their "macho man". Should be happy.
12. I still can't believe he is a billionaire.
13. Something we can agree on.
14. Can this be true. I'm sorry if I'm getting folks hopes up.
item.dc:creator: MidlifecrisisDad

item.title: Collection of memes 8

item.title: "One bird can't make a pun. But toucan."
item.description: Because I found it funny. :3 Made by drousnavat. (Probably?)
item.dc:creator: BiNorwayBoy

item.title: Thanks dudes.
item.description: For real though. Lounged around, played Atomfall, ate takeout (not sushi. Couldn't find a sushi delivery, can you believe that?). Today, got up, did laundry, dishes, made pulled pork (it's on hour 8 of 16), and went for a five mile jog/walk. Thanks again for the kind words. Y'all are the best. Except for you, you know who tiny octopus is talking to. No, not you, them. Behind the other dude. Yeah...sheesh. That dude.
item.dc:creator: TinyOctopus

item.title: What Happened Today #58
item.description: They’re not hiding it. They’re banning books, firing peacekeepers, and threatening to annex Greenland. This isn’t a stunt. It’s a strategy — from anime ICE memes to purging the Pentagon, they’re showing us exactly how far they’ll go. Believe them. Read today’s post. Share it. Subscribe for free to stay informed and loud --> https://govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/2025/03/29/trump-greenland-military-force-denmark/82722287007/ 2. https://apnews.com/article/attack-plans-trump-signal-hegseth-waltz-759a404c89ee45468fb54a2be800c32a 3. https://www.cbsnews.com/news/us-institute-of-peace-staff-termination-notices/ 4. https://www.jsonline.com/story/news/politics/elections/2025/03/29/wisconsin-court-rejects-effort-to-block-elon-musk-voter-payments/82721261007/ 5. https://www.washingtonpost.com/national-security/2025/03/29/secret-pentagon-memo-hegseth-heritage-foundation-china/ 6. https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/donald-trump/trump-says-couldnt-care-less-automakers-raise-prices-tariffs-rcna198731 7. https://www.npr.org/2025/03/29/nx-s1-5344487/white-house-correspondents-dinner-amber-ruffin 8. https://www.nytimes.com/2025/03/29/us/politics/victoria-spartz-republican-town-hall-doge.html 9. https://www.politico.com/news/2025/03/29/protesters-elon-musk-tesla-00259304 10. https://www.politico.com/news/2025/03/29/doge-marco-elez-software-engineer-us-payroll-00259303 11. https://www.axios.com/2025/03/29/trump-memes-immigration-policies 12. https://www.msn.com/en-us/news/world/trump-administration-reportedly-moves-to-ban-jackie-robinson-biography-from-naval-academy-library/ar-AA1BURCM 13. https://www.msn.com/en-us/news/us/we-re-kind-of-BingNewsVerp
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: MRW I find out that my friend is moving back home to Canada after living in Texas for a year and a half.
item.description: Maybe it was because of that guy that killed a cop outside her workplace then hurt a K9 and then he finally got gunned down at the back door of her workplace. That was a lot for a Canadian.
item.dc:creator: MadameRainbowPants

item.title: Roger Moore - a class act
item.dc:creator: inkican

item.title: The “now I HAVE to delete these from my phone, because my storage is full” dump - Videa Edition!
item.description:
My phone literally cannot update, because it’s too full. So have some videos!
Make sure you’re on wifi, ok?
Nothing original—all this came from Imgur, over the years.
I wish this one had sound!
Fond memories of 2020.
We didn’t know how good we had it.
From the J6 attack. Mace her again.
A classic.
From the GameStop stock thing!
Fuck Ted Cruz.
Fuck Greg Abbott.
I miss that barge. Simpler times.
I love huskies.
item.dc:creator: Dragongurl392

item.title: It’s Official - 200lbs down!!!
item.description: My hat’s off to the Imgur community for their unknown support. You all kept me smiling and laughing through this ordeal. I can never thank you enough.
